body.dependency:
"<(>" "(" PUNCT LEFT #1->2 "" "LOGGA" ? @X #2->0 "<)>" ")" PUNCT RIGHT #3->4 : "" "ruottalainen" N Sg Nom @HNOUN #4->0 "suomalainen" A Nom Cmp #4->0 "ruottalainen" N Sg Nom @HNOUN #4->0 "suomalainen" N Nom Cmp #4->0 : "" "RAJAVÄYLÄKOMIšUUNI" ? @X #5->0 : "<¶>" "¶" CLB #6->4 :\n "" "hakea" V Act Imprt Sg2 @FMV #1->0 : "<¶>" "¶" CLB #2->1 :\n "" "http:www" ? @X #1->0 "<.>" "." CLB #2->2 "" "fsgk" ? @X #1->0 "" "/" PUNCT MIDDLE #2->3 "" "SRRVK" ? @X #3->0 "<.>" "."
